name: CustomPartBase.CustomPartInputType
summary: Defines the type of the input.

enum_values.name: INPUT_2_POINTS
enum_values.summary: The input is two points. The data is returned as an array list of points. Default value.

enum_values.name: INPUT_1_POINT
enum_values.summary: The input is one point. The data is returned as an array list of points.
